referencedTypes.name: CommandEmptyProps

members.name: emptyLabel
members.description: Empty label.

members.name: disabled
members.description: When `true`, prevents the user from interacting with listbox

members.name: dir
members.description:
The reading direction of the listbox when applicable.
If omitted, inherits globally from `ConfigProvider` or assumes LTR (left-to-right) reading mode.

members.name: name
members.description: The name of the field. Submitted with its owning form as part of a name/value pair.

members.name: defaultValue
members.description:
The default value of the selected item(s).

Use this when you need to set the initial state of the items.

members.name: modelValue
members.description:
The controlled value of the selected item(s).

Use this when you need to control the state of the items. Can be bound with `v-model`

members.name: highlightOnHover
members.description: When `true`, hover over item will trigger highlight

members.name: required
members.description: When `true`, indicates that the user must set the value before the owning form can be submitted.

members.name: orientation
members.description:
The orientation of the listbox.
Mainly so arrow navigation is done accordingly (left & right vs. up & down)

members.name: selectionBehavior
members.description: How multiple selection should behave in the collection.

members.name: multiple
members.description:
Determines whether a "single" or "multiple" items can be selected at a time.

This prop will overwrite the inferred type from `modelValue` and `defaultValue`.
